## my spectrwm config
<div align="left" width = "600px">

```Go
         spectrwm config
  -------------------------------
  wm           -> spectrwm
  bar          -> polybar
  app launcher -> dmenu
  terminal     -> st/kitty
  editor       -> neovim/emacs/vscode(rare use cases)
  shell        -> zsh
  font         -> Jet Brains Mono NF
  
```

</div>
